name: jetblue / Airlines workflow 800
task: Find the flight from New York to Miami from Mar 27 to Mar 31  that has the lowest core price in points.
goal_pattern: Find the flight from New York to Miami from Mar 27 to Mar 31  that has the lowest core price in points.

steps.success_signal: The page advances or the selected field reflects the intended value.
